reply:
[[BLOCK:slide6_shape1]]
A student inquired about ways to improve his grade. I explained that my fifty-variable regression model could predict nearly 89% of test performance: study for longer hours, increase income, purchase a reliable car, reduce TV watching, browse the Web more frequently, exercise regularly, attend church services more often, pray more frequently, limit movie outings, play fewer video games, get haircuts more often, and consume more milk and coffee, among other factors.  
This overly complex model is impractical!
